chapter_title.ar: بَابُ وُجُوبِ إِجْلَالِ ذِي الشَّيْبَةِ الْمُسْلِمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The Obligation of respecting the Muslim with old age

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/560)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/560)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ إِجْلَالِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِجْلَالُ الْمُؤْمِنِ ذِي الشَّيْبَةِ وَ مَنْ أَكْرَمَ مُؤْمِناً فَبِكَرَامَةِ اللَّهِ بَدَأَ وَ مَنِ اسْتَخَفَّ بِمُؤْمِنٍ ذِي شَيْبَةٍ أَرْسَلَ اللَّهُ إِلَيْهِ مَنْ يَسْتَخِفُّ بِهِ قَبْلَ مَوْتِهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Abu Nahshal, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws said to me: ‘From the respect of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is respecting the Momin with old age; and the one who honours a Momin, so he has begun by honouring Allahazwj, and the one takes lightly with a Momin with old age, Allahazwj would Send him one who would take lightly with him before his death’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from abu Nahshal from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) said to me, ‘It is respecting Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, to respect an old believing person. Whoever honors an old believing person has begun (with) honoring Allah. Whoever disrespects an old believing person, Allah will send to him someone who will disrespect him before his death.’”
